# isRecordZoneNotification

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether this notification is a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordZoneNotification] object.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute Boolean isRecordZoneNotification;
```

## Discussion

This property is `true`.

## Getting the Notification Type

- **notificationType**: The type of notification.
